about.title: About Benatna
about.intro: Benatna is the first Moroccan platform that directly connects travelers and local rental agencies, without international intermediaries.
about.missionText: Facilitate mobility in Morocco by connecting travelers with trusted local agencies, while making the rental process simple, transparent and accessible to all.
about.visionText: To become the reference for car rental in Morocco by combining technological innovation and local anchoring.
about.value1Text: We value direct relationships between customers and local agencies
about.value2Text: Clear prices, no hidden fees or surprises
about.whyBenatnaText: Benatna means 'between us' in Moroccan Arabic. This name reflects our approach: creating human technology that directly connects people, without complex intermediaries.
about.humanTechText: Our platform is a tool at the service of human relationships. We believe the best rental experience comes from direct contact with local professionals who know their trade.

testimonials.ahmed: Since we joined Benatna, our booking rate has increased by 40%. The platform is easy to use and the team is very responsive. We receive quality customers who are genuinely looking for an authentic local service.
testimonials.fatima: Benatna has allowed us to grow without investing in expensive marketing. The 15% commission is very reasonable compared to the 30-35% charged by major international platforms. And above all, no hidden fees!
testimonials.youssef: What convinced me about Benatna is their human approach. We don't feel like just a number. The team understands our constraints as a local agency and works with us, not against us. Payments are always on time.
testimonials.karim: I was skeptical at first, but after 6 months on Benatna, we've filled 25% of our fleet thanks to the platform. Customers come already informed and ready to rent. It saves us precious time on negotiation.
testimonials.nadia: Benatna has transformed the way we work. Before, we spent hours responding to disorganized WhatsApp requests. Now everything is centralized, professional, and customers find us easily. Our revenue has increased by 35% in one year.
testimonials.omar: As a small family agency, we couldn't compete with the big franchises. Benatna gave us a professional and credible showcase. We're on equal footing with the big players, and our customers appreciate the personalized service we offer.

calculator.disclaimer: This simulation is indicative and based on market averages. Actual revenue depends on many factors: quality of your fleet, seasonality, location, etc.
